activities.name: lk_get_pipeline_parameters
activities.description: Get the parameters to be used in this pipeline

sqlReaderQuery.value:
@concat('SELECT wo_work_order.equipment, wo_work_order.equipment_class, case when ''','gl_timeoffset',''' is not null then dbo.sp_get_client_date(wo_work_order.plant, wo_work_order.entered_date, eq_events.time_created) else wo_work_order.entered_date end as entered_date, wo_work_order.requested_completion, case when ''','gl_timeoffset',''' is not null then dbo.sp_get_client_date(wo_work_order.plant, wo_work_order.completed_date, eq_events.event_end_time) else wo_work_order.completed_date end as completed_date, wo_work_order.last_modified, wo_work_order.status,wo_work_order.work_class, wo_work_order.iso9000, wo_resources.workers, wo_work_order.planned_hours as wo_planned_hours, wo_work_order.down_hours, wo_resources.planned_hours as res_planned_hours, wo_resources.actual_hours, wo_work_order.planned_labor+wo_work_order.planned_nonstock+wo_work_order.planned_stores+wo_work_order.planned_services+wo_work_order.planned_tools as planned_hours_total, eq_v_event_costs.internal_labor, eq_v_event_costs.contract_labor, eq_v_event_costs.internal_nonstock, eq_v_event_costs.contract_nonstock, eq_v_event_costs.stores_material, eq_v_event_costs.services, eq_v_event_costs.internal_tool, eq_v_event_costs.contract_tool, eq_v_event_costs.internal_other, eq_v_event_costs.contract_other, wo_work_order.wo_base, wo_work_order.wo_task, wo_work_order.wo_subtask, eq_events.failure_flag, wo_work_order.planned_labor, wo_work_order.planned_nonstock, wo_work_order.planned_stores, wo_work_order.planned_services, wo_work_order.planned_tools, wo_work_order.plant,isnull(wo_resources.resource_id,'''') as resource_id 
FROM wo_work_order JOIN eq_events ON wo_work_order.plant = eq_events.plant AND wo_work_order.wo_base = eq_events.wo_base AND wo_work_order.wo_task = eq_events.wo_task AND wo_work_order.wo_subtask = eq_events.wo_subtask LEFT OUTER JOIN wo_resources ON wo_work_order.plant = wo_resources.plant AND wo_work_order.wo_base = wo_resources.wo_base AND wo_work_order.wo_task = wo_resources.wo_task AND wo_work_order.wo_subtask = wo_resources.wo_subtask LEFT OUTER JOIN eq_v_event_costs ON wo_work_order.plant = eq_v_event_costs.plant AND wo_work_order.wo_base = eq_v_event_costs.wo_base AND wo_work_order.wo_task = eq_v_event_costs.wo_task AND wo_work_order.wo_subtask = eq_v_event_costs.wo_subtask where wo_work_order.plant =''',item(),''' AND wo_work_order.last_modified >=''',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.last_run_start_date,'''')
